---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused Pinemeter improvement or provider workflow
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Please focus on the user problem and avoid sharing private account details, provider
credentials, cookies, tokens, session identifiers, API keys, request headers, or raw
provider responses. Use SECURITY.md for credential handling, privacy, or vulnerability
concerns.
-->

## User problem

<!-- What are you trying to do, and what gets in the way today? -->

## Area

<!-- Claude monitoring, ChatGPT optional visibility, Gemini optional visibility, browser import, menu bar/notifications, settings/setup wizard, usage JSON export, documentation/contributor experience, or other. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- Describe the smallest useful change. -->

## Expected benefit

<!-- Who benefits and how will they notice the improvement? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Existing workaround, simpler approach, or why current behavior is not enough. -->

## Provider and setup context

<!-- Optional, sanitized only: affected provider, setup path, macOS version, Pinemeter version/commit, or source build via xcodebuild. Do not include tokens, cookies, session keys, API keys, headers, or account identifiers. -->

## Privacy or credential impact

<!-- Does this change touch provider sessions, cookies, tokens, API keys, browser import, Keychain, logs, screenshots, exports, or account-identifying state? If yes, describe the risk without sharing secrets. -->
